title: PortalMod
body:
![PortalMod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2a8ac1e46d43d63102a3dcb0b2541e60ea033b9.png)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0fbbf79fd11a2b47b0fca7481caf73cfe7f4eb6.png) ![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97b6452651ae30dc9af109a41ba5600d345af51b.png) Welcome to **PortalMod**, a project aiming to **reimagine the Portal experience** in Minecraft. Besides the **Portal Gun**, PortalMod adds a variety of **features from the Portal franchise, redesigned** to feel at home in Minecraft. The mod is developed with **full survival compatibility** and **multiplayer support** in mind, for building and solving test chambers with friends. Cake included!
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0fbbf79fd11a2b47b0fca7481caf73cfe7f4eb6.png) ![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96acf62bd1de822cef04fdb7ff50563088726f64.png) > This mod adds a **variety of test elements from the Portal games**, allowing you to create **your own test chambers**. > We got **Cubes** and **Cube Droppers** as well as cool **Buttons** for revolutionary cube-and-button based testing. These buttons connect to **Chamber Doors** with **Antlines**, similar to redstone. > You can further enrich your chambers with **Gels**, **Fizzlers**, **Aerial Faith Plates**, **Autoportals** and more! Or add hazards like **Turrets** or **Deadly Goo** to remove unwanted test subjects after testing.

We also, of course, didn't forget to include some awesome decorative blocks. The **white and black panels** come in **many variants**, as well as a lot of additional **variety in placement**. Decorate more with flickering **Chamber Lights**, configurable **Chamber Signs**, **Platforms** and **Beams** great for stairs, and some really nice types of **Iron Frames** for all kinds of structural builds.
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0fbbf79fd11a2b47b0fca7481caf73cfe7f4eb6.png) ![Community](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b32841f142791870694906d5ddbc65f59bc1f2d.png) > Join our **[Discord server](https://discord.gg/hUXXtfJc44)** to **share your creations**, discuss all kinds of topics, **participate in cool community events** and get **exclusive updates** while we work on porting the mod to modern versions of Minecraft. > You can report **issues** or **suggestions** on the **[Github Issues page](https://github.com/snowy-shack/PortalMod/issues)**. We could really use some help on how we can improve the mod!
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0fbbf79fd11a2b47b0fca7481caf73cfe7f4eb6.png) ![Support](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2f61b04e3f817b0a7f364888bd3e7dedaea993b.png) If you'd like to **support the project**, you can do so on our **[Donate page](https://portalmod.net/donate/)**, or by **boosting** our **[Discord server](https://discord.gg/hUXXtfJc44)**! Both of these will **unlock** a special **Portal Gun skin** in-game, **visible to everyone**! More info on Portal Gun skins **[here](https://portalmod.net/info/skins)**.
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0fbbf79fd11a2b47b0fca7481caf73cfe7f4eb6.png)
